title: eutrema edwardsii subsp. compactum
intro: Eutrema edwardsii subsp. compactum, also known as compact alpine pepper or compact mountain pepper, is a subspecies of alpine pepper native to the mountainous regions of Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eutrema edwardsii subsp. compactum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
